title: T-007 — UI: FIN-008 FX Rates page + MODAL-05 (fin_fx_rates + fx_rate_override_modal)
prompt:
# T-007 — FIN-008 FX Rates + MODAL-05 UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.1 FIN-008 Exchange Rates + Currencies; §8.5 MODAL-05 FX Rate Override; §11.1 V-FIN-SETUP-03 (warn if rate older than 7 days); §5.5 GBP base for Apex.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:119-250` (`fin_fx_rates`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:342-383` (`fx_rate_override_modal`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/fx-rates` listing currencies + active rates + 30-day history TrendChart; MODAL-05 dialog for manual override with conditional reason validation; stale-rate Alert when any active rate > 7 days old.

## Prototype parity
References:
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:119-250` page shell
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:342-383` override modal
shadcn primitives: Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableCell, Select, Button, Badge, Alert, Card (page); Dialog, DialogContent, DialogFooter, Form, FormField, Input, RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem, Textarea, Button (modal).
Parity checklist (page):
1. Stale Rate Alert (amber) when any active currency rate has `updated_at < now() - 7 days` (V-FIN-SETUP-03 — server-rendered).
2. Currencies Table: Code, Name, Is Base badge, Current Rate (mono font), Rate Age badge (fresh/stale/expired — `<5d=secondary`, `5-7d=warning`, `>7d=destructive`), Last Updated, Source Badge (manual/api), Edit button → MODAL-05.
3. Rate History Card: currency Selector + TrendChart (Recharts LineChart) for 30 days of history — fetched via `getExchangeRateHistory` from T-004.
4. 'Change Base Currency' link guarded by `fin.currency.admin` permission — opens P2-disabled confirmation modal (P2 toast 'Available in Phase 2' is acceptable).
Parity checklist (modal):
1. Modal size 'default'; single-page form.
2. Source RadioGroup (Manual / API Pull); switching to API hides Reason field.
3. New Rate Input (mono font, NUMERIC(15,6), Zod >0).
4. Effective Date DatePicker (cannot be in the future for P1 — Zod refine).
5. Reason Textarea (only when source='manual'; Zod superRefine: `min(20)` chars required).
6. Summary panel: Currency code, Current Rate (read-only), Effective Date.
7. Save → `createExchangeRate` Server Action (T-004); on success closes modal + toast + revalidates page.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/fx-rates/page.tsx` — RSC fetches active currencies + their latest rates + stale flag.
2. `app/finance/fx-rates/_components/fx-table.tsx` — client component for table + history chart.
3. `app/finance/fx-rates/_components/fx-override-modal.tsx` — MODAL-05.
4. `app/finance/fx-rates/_components/__tests__/fx-table.test.tsx` + `fx-override-modal.test.tsx`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/fx-rates/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/fx-rates/_components/fx-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/fx-rates/_components/fx-override-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/fx-rates/_components/__tests__/fx-table.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/fx-rates/_components/__tests__/fx-override-modal.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given page renders with any active currency whose updated_at > 7 days ago, when user lands, then Stale Rate amber Alert is present citing V-FIN-SETUP-03. AND given Rate Age column, when rate age is 3/6/9 days, then badge variant is secondary/warning/destructive respectively.
- Given MODAL-05 renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:342-383, then Source RadioGroup + Reason conditional + Effective Date + Summary match 1:1 (RTL parity snapshot — structural + visual + interaction parity verified).
- Given source='Manual' and reason 'too short', when Save click, then Zod superRefine rejects and Server Action NOT invoked. AND given source='API Pull', when Save click, then Reason is not rendered and Save passes validation without a reason.
- Given user without fin.currency.admin, when page renders, then Edit + 'Change Base Currency' hidden. AND given successful override commit, when modal closes, then table re-renders with new rate and Source badge.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: fx-override-modal.test.tsx asserts parity, conditional Reason visibility, Zod min-length, Source toggle, Save invocation. fx-table.test.tsx asserts stale Alert rendering by mocking `now()`, Rate Age badge variants, RBAC visibility.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/fx-rates`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not recompute historical transactions when an FX rate is overridden — per translation note the action ONLY updates `exchange_rates` table; past `material_consumption_costs` retain their original unit_costs.
- Do not skip the stale-rate Alert (V-FIN-SETUP-03 must be visible to operators).
- Do not use HTML `<select>` instead of shadcn Select.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not regress accessibility.

pipeline_inputs.description: FIN-008 FX Rates page + MODAL-05 override modal with conditional Reason validation + stale rate Alert (V-FIN-SETUP-03).
pipeline_inputs.details: Page renders stale Alert server-side; table shows Rate Age badge with 3 variants. Modal conditionally renders Reason field based on Source radio; manual requires reason ≥20 chars via Zod superRefine. Historical transactions are NOT recalculated on override (audit-compliant). Recharts LineChart used for 30d history (per translation note — pass actual floats, no ×10000 scaling). [AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
out_of_scope: API auto-sync from ECB/XE.com P2 OQ-FIN-03
acceptance_criteria: Given page renders with any active currency whose updated_at > 7 days ago, when user lands, then Stale Rate amber Alert is present citing V-FIN-SETUP-03. AND given Rate Age column, when rate age is 3/6/9 days, then badge variant is secondary/warning/destructive respectively.

Given MODAL-05 renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:342-383, then Source RadioGroup + Reason conditional + Effective Date + Summary match 1:1 (RTL parity snapshot — structural + visual + interaction parity verified).

Given source='Manual' and reason 'too short', when Save click, then Zod superRefine rejects and Server Action NOT invoked. AND given source='API Pull', when Save click, then Reason is not rendered and Save passes validation without a reason.

Given user without fin.currency.admin, when page renders, then Edit + 'Change Base Currency' hidden. AND given successful override commit, when modal closes, then table re-renders with new rate and Source badge.
test_strategy: RED: fx-override-modal.test.tsx asserts parity + conditional Reason + Zod min-length + Save invocation. fx-table.test.tsx asserts stale Alert + badge variants + RBAC.

Closeout-evidence check (hoisted from former AC): UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (referenced by ui_evidence_policy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires).
risk_red_lines: Do not recompute historical transactions on FX override.
Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
